Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-ChildItem Cert:\\CurrentUser\\My | Where-Object { $_.Subject -like "*Mayce*" } | Format-List Subject, NotBefore, NotAfter')

Bash("/c/Program Files/PowerShell/7/pwsh.exe" -NoProfile -Command '
$asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\("C:\\Users\\Mayce\\.nuget\\packages\\monogame.framework.windowsdx\\3.8.2.1105\\lib\\net8.0-windows7.0\\MonoGame.Framework.dll"\)
$gd = $asm.GetType\("Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Graphics.GraphicsDevice"\)
Write-Host "=== GraphicsDevice Fields ==="
$gd.GetFields\("Instance,NonPublic"\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "swap|chain|device|d3d|dxgi|render|target|back" } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.FieldType.Name\) $\($_.Name\)" }
Write-Host "=== GraphicsDevice Properties ==="
$gd.GetProperties\("Instance,Public,NonPublic"\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "swap|chain|device|d3d|dxgi|render|target|back|handle|present" } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.PropertyType.Name\) $\($_.Name\)" }
')
